sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n31958" key="e)kexeirofo/ros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκεχειροφόρος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n31958.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">herald of truce,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:94" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.94</biblScope> </bibl> : metaph., <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἔδωκεν αὐτοῖς ὥσπερ ἐ. τὸν ἀέρα</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mediator</tr_> between fire and water, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.</author> </bibl> Tyr. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1487.tlg001:15:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
